title: 3 Days Sri Lanka Cultural Highlights - Dambulla, Sigiriya & Kandy Tour
summary: An exclusive journey through Sri Lanka’s cultural heart.
route: Bandaranaike International Airport → Sigiriya → Kandy → Bandaranaike International Airport
overview:
Are you ready to discover Sri Lanka’s ancient wonders and sacred cities? Our 3 Day Sigiriya & Kandy Cultural Highlights Tour invites you on a memorable journey through the island’s rich heritage and breathtaking landscapes. Begin with a warm welcome at Bandaranaike International Airport before travelling to the iconic Sigiriya Rock Fortress, one of Sri Lanka’s most spectacular UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Along the way, enjoy the option to explore the magnificent Dambulla Cave Temple and immerse yourself in centuries of history.

Continue your adventure to the charming hill capital of Kandy, stopping at a traditional spice garden in Matale en route. In Kandy, experience the spiritual atmosphere of the revered Temple of the Tooth Relic and witness the vibrant rhythms of a traditional Kandyan cultural dance performance. From ancient kingdoms and sacred temples to lush countryside views, this short yet enriching escape captures the very essence of Sri Lanka.

Perfect for first-time visitors or travellers short on time, this tour combines comfort, culture, and seamless private transfers throughout. Travel with an experienced driver, enjoy handpicked accommodations, and explore at your own pace. Let us take care of every detail while you uncover the cultural heart of Sri Lanka. Book your journey today and experience history brought to life.

dayByDay.title: Day 1
dayByDay.description:
Upon arrival at Bandaranaike International Airport, you will be warmly welcomed by our representative.
After clearing customs, please proceed to the arrival hall where you will see a name board with your name displayed.

You will then begin your comfortable private transfer to Sigiriya. (We can also arrange pick-up from your hotel or residence in Colombo City.)

Optional En-Route Experience

Depending on your flight arrival time, you may choose to visit the Dambulla Cave Temple, a UNESCO World Heritage Site famous for its beautifully preserved Buddhist murals and statues.
Please note: Entrance tickets are payable locally.

Upon arrival in Sigiriya, check in to your hotel and relax after your journey.

dayByDay.title: Day 2
dayByDay.description:
Start your day early with a visit to the iconic Sigiriya Rock Fortress, one of Sri Lanka’s most celebrated landmarks. Climb the ancient rock citadel and enjoy breathtaking views from the summit.
Entrance tickets can be purchased on site.

After your visit, proceed to Kandy.

Optional En-Route Stop - Spice Garden in Matale

On your way, you may visit a traditional Spice Garden in Matale, where you can learn about Sri Lanka’s world-renowned spices and Ayurvedic herbs.
Any purchases or entrance fees are payable locally.

Arrive in Kandy in the afternoon.

Afternoon & Evening in Kandy

You may visit the sacred Temple of the Tooth Relic, one of the most important Buddhist sites in the world.
In the evening, enjoy a vibrant traditional Kandyan cultural dance performance showcasing Sri Lanka’s rich artistic heritage.

Entrance tickets for the Temple and dance show are payable locally.

dayByDay.title: Day 3
dayByDay.description:
After breakfast, depart from Kandy and transfer to Bandaranaike International Airport in time for your departure flight.

Alternatively, we can drop you off at your hotel or residence within Colombo City.

title: 3 Days Sri Lanka Beach & City - Bentota Beach & Colombo Tour
summary: Golden beaches, coastal relaxation, and vibrant city experiences in a short tropical escape.
route: Bandaranaike International Airport → Bentota → Colombo → Bandaranaike International Airport
overview:
Looking for the perfect short tropical getaway? Our 3 Day Bentota & Colombo Escape combines golden beaches, coastal relaxation, and vibrant city experiences into one unforgettable journey.

Begin your adventure on Sri Lanka’s stunning southwest coast in Bentota, where palm-fringed beaches and turquoise waters create the perfect setting to unwind. Whether you choose to relax by the ocean or enjoy thrilling water sports, your time in Bentota offers the ideal blend of leisure and adventure.

Continue to Colombo, the island’s dynamic capital city, where colonial charm meets modern energy. Explore historic temples, colorful mosques, bustling streets, and oceanfront promenades before ending your journey with seamless airport transfers. Perfect for couples, families, or travelers short on time, this tour delivers beach bliss and city highlights in just three memorable days

title: 3 Days Sri Lanka Tea Country Escape - Kandy & Nuwara Eliya Tour
summary: A scenic hill-country escape through sacred Kandy and cool-climate Nuwara Eliya.
route: Bandaranaike International Airport → Kandy → Nuwara Eliya → Bandaranaike International Airport
overview:
Escape to the cool highlands of Sri Lanka on this unforgettable 3-day journey through Kandy and Nuwara Eliya. Blending sacred heritage, scenic mountain landscapes, and colonial charm, this tour offers the perfect introduction to Sri Lanka’s enchanting hill country.

Begin in Kandy, the island’s cultural capital and home to the revered Temple of the Tooth Relic. Experience the spiritual atmosphere of this sacred city and enjoy an evening of traditional Kandyan dance, showcasing Sri Lanka’s vibrant performing arts.

Continue your journey into the misty mountains of Nuwara Eliya, where rolling tea plantations and cool climates create a refreshing change of scenery. Visit a working tea factory to discover how world-famous Ceylon tea is produced, stroll along Gregory Lake, and admire the town’s charming colonial architecture.

Perfect for couples, families, or travelers seeking cooler climates and cultural depth, this short yet enriching escape captures the very essence of Sri Lanka’s hill country — all with seamless private transfers and carefully curated experiences.

(Entrance tickets are payable locally.)

En-Route Highlights

Visit a traditional Tea Factory and plantation to learn about Sri Lanka’s world-famous Ceylon tea.

Arrive in Nuwara Eliya and explore the town’s charming attractions, including:

Gregory Lake, perfect for a relaxing lakeside stroll

The historic Old Post Office, a colonial-era landmark

Check in to your hotel and enjoy the cool mountain atmosphere.

title: 4 Days Sri Lanka Hill Country & Beach Escape - Kandy, Nuwara Eliya & Galle Tour

overview:
Discover the diverse beauty of Sri Lanka on this unforgettable 4-day journey through cultural cities, scenic hill country, and the island’s stunning southern coastline. This tour offers the perfect introduction to Sri Lanka’s rich heritage, breathtaking landscapes, and charming coastal towns.

Begin your adventure in Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka and home to the sacred Temple of the Tooth Relic. Continue into the cool highlands of Nuwara Eliya, famous for its rolling tea plantations, refreshing climate, and colonial charm. From the misty mountains, travel south to the historic coastal city of Galle, where cobblestone streets, colonial architecture, and ocean views create a unique blend of history and tropical beauty.

Perfect for travelers who want to experience Sri Lanka’s cultural landmarks, scenic mountain landscapes, and beautiful southern coast in a short time, this tour combines unforgettable sights with comfortable private transfers throughout your journey.

Explore the famous Galle Dutch Fort, a UNESCO World Heritage Site known for its charming cobblestone streets, colonial architecture, boutique shops, and oceanfront ramparts.

title: 14 Days - Cultural Heritage, Hill Country, Wildlife & Coastal Escape
summary: A complete 14-day Sri Lanka route through ancient cities, tea country, Gal Oya, Yala, Galle, and Colombo.
route: Bandaranaike International Airport → Sigiriya → Kandy → Nuwara Eliya → Ella → Gal Oya → Yala → Galle → Colombo → Bandaranaike International Airport
overview:
Experience the very best of Sri Lanka on this immersive 14-day journey through ancient kingdoms, misty hill country landscapes, unique wildlife encounters, and the stunning southern coastline. This carefully crafted itinerary offers a perfect blend of culture, nature, adventure, and relaxation, showcasing the island’s most iconic destinations as well as some hidden gems.

Begin your journey in Sigiriya, located in the heart of Sri Lanka’s Cultural Triangle, where ancient cities and the legendary Sigiriya Rock Fortress reveal the island’s royal heritage. Explore the historic ruins of Polonnaruwa before continuing to Kandy, Sri Lanka’s cultural capital and home to the sacred Temple of the Tooth Relic.

Travel onward into the cool highlands of Nuwara Eliya, surrounded by rolling tea plantations and colonial charm, before reaching the scenic mountain town of Ella, famous for breathtaking viewpoints and the iconic Nine Arches Bridge. Your adventure continues to the remote wilderness of Gal Oya National Park, where rare boat safaris offer opportunities to see elephants swimming between islands.

Continue south to Yala National Park for an exciting wildlife safari, before heading to the historic coastal city of Galle, where the UNESCO-listed Dutch Fort, charming streets, and nearby beaches offer the perfect place to relax along Sri Lanka’s southern coast. Conclude your journey in Colombo, the island’s vibrant capital city, where colonial architecture, colorful temples, and seaside promenades reflect Sri Lanka’s modern spirit.

This tour is ideal for travelers seeking a comprehensive Sri Lankan experience — combining history, nature, wildlife, and coastal beauty in one unforgettable journey.

dayByDay.title: Day 1 – Arrival & Transfer to Sigiriya
dayByDay.description:
Overnight: Sigiriya
Distance: 170 km
Travel Time: Approx. 3.5 – 4 hours

Upon arrival at Bandaranaike International Airport, you will be warmly welcomed by our representative. After clearing customs, please proceed to the arrival hall where you will find a name board displaying your name.

Begin your private transfer to Sigiriya, located in the heart of Sri Lanka’s Cultural Triangle.

Depending on your arrival time, you may visit the nearby Dambulla Cave Temple, a UNESCO World Heritage Site known for its ancient Buddhist murals and statues (entrance tickets payable locally).

Check in to your hotel and relax for the evening.

dayByDay.title: Day 2 – Sigiriya & Polonnaruwa Exploration
dayByDay.description:
Overnight: Sigiriya
Distance: 140 km
Travel Time: Approx. 3 hours total driving

After breakfast, visit the iconic Sigiriya Rock Fortress, one of Sri Lanka’s most famous UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Climb the ancient rock citadel and enjoy breathtaking views from the summit (entrance tickets payable locally).

Later, travel to the ancient city of Polonnaruwa, a former royal capital known for its impressive ruins, temples, and beautifully preserved Buddha statues.

Return to Sigiriya for the evening.

dayByDay.title: Day 3 – Sigiriya to Kandy
dayByDay.description:
Overnight: Kandy
Distance: 100 km
Travel Time: Approx. 2.5 – 3 hours

After breakfast, depart Sigiriya and travel to Kandy, Sri Lanka’s cultural capital.

En-Route Experience

Visit a Spice Garden in Matale to learn about Sri Lanka’s famous spices and Ayurvedic herbs.

Upon arrival in Kandy, visit the sacred Temple of the Tooth Relic, one of the most important Buddhist sites in the world.

In the evening, enjoy a traditional Kandyan cultural dance performance (tickets payable locally).

dayByDay.title: Day 4 – Kandy to Nuwara Eliya
dayByDay.description:
Overnight: Nuwara Eliya
Distance: 90 km
Travel Time: Approx. 3 – 3.5 hours

After breakfast, depart Kandy and travel through scenic mountain roads towards Nuwara Eliya, often referred to as “Little England”.

En-Route Highlights

Visit a Tea Plantation and Factory to learn about the production of world-famous Ceylon tea.

Upon arrival, explore attractions such as Gregory Lake and the historic Old Post Office before checking in to your hotel.

dayByDay.title: Day 5 – Nuwara Eliya Exploration
dayByDay.description:
Overnight: Nuwara Eliya
Distance: Approx. 70 km local travel

Spend the day exploring the charming hill town of Nuwara Eliya. Enjoy scenic viewpoints overlooking tea plantations, visit additional tea estates, or relax around Gregory Lake while enjoying the cool mountain climate.

dayByDay.title: Day 6 – Nuwara Eliya to Ella
dayByDay.description:
Overnight: Ella
Distance: 70 km
Travel Time: Approx. 2 – 2.5 hours

After breakfast, depart Nuwara Eliya and travel to the picturesque mountain town of Ella.

Visit popular attractions including:

Nine Arches Bridge

Little Adam’s Peak viewpoint

Ravana Falls

Check in to your hotel and enjoy the relaxed atmosphere of this charming hill town.

dayByDay.title: Day 7 – Ella to Gal Oya National Park
dayByDay.description:
Overnight: Gal Oya
Distance: 160 km
Travel Time: Approx. 4 – 4.5 hours

After breakfast, depart Ella and travel east towards Gal Oya National Park, one of Sri Lanka’s most remote and unique wildlife destinations.

Check in to your lodge and enjoy the peaceful natural surroundings.

dayByDay.title: Day 8 – Gal Oya National Park Experience

Overnight: Gal Oya
Distance: Approx. 50 km local travel

Enjoy a full day exploring Gal Oya National Park.

One of the highlights is a boat safari on Senanayake Samudraya, where visitors may witness elephants swimming between islands — a rare wildlife experience unique to this park.

You may also enjoy guided nature walks or cultural visits to learn about the indigenous Vedda community.

dayByDay.title: Day 9 – Gal Oya to Yala National Park

Overnight: Yala
Distance: 160 km
Travel Time: Approx. 4 hours

After breakfast, depart Gal Oya and travel south to Yala National Park, one of Sri Lanka’s most famous wildlife reserves.

In the afternoon, embark on an exciting jeep safari, where you may encounter elephants, leopards, crocodiles, sloth bears, and a wide variety of bird species.
